content.problemStatement:
Luigi has an array AAA of NNN positive integers. He wants to make all elements of the array **equal**.

In one move, he can:


Choose an index iii (1‚Č§i‚Č§N)(1\le i \le N)(1‚Č§i‚Č§N) and divide the element AiA_iAi‚Äč by **any one** of its divisors.

In other words, he can choose a positive integer XXX such that X‚ą£AiX | A_iX‚ą£Ai‚Äč and set Ai:=AiXA_i := \frac{A_i}{X}Ai‚Äč:=XAi‚Äč‚Äč.
Find the **minimum** number of moves required to make all the elements of the array **equal**.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains NNN, the size of array AAA.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers, the elements of array AAA.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line, the **minimum** number of moves required to make all elements of the array equal.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: We can change 222222 to 111111 using an operation (divide by 222). Thus, using one operation, we made all the elements equal.
Test case 222: All numbers are already same. Thus, we do not need to do any operations.
Test case 333: We make the following operations:

Choose i=3i = 3i=3 and X=4X = 4X=4, such that 4‚ą£164|164‚ą£16. Thus, A3:=164=4A_3 := \frac{16}{4} = 4A3‚Äč:=416‚Äč=4.
Choose i=4i = 4i=4 and X=2X = 2X=2, such that 2‚ą£82|82‚ą£8. Thus, A4:=82=4A_4 := \frac{8}{2} = 4A4‚Äč:=28‚Äč=4.

Thus, using two operations, we made all the elements equal.
Test case 444: We make the following operations:

Choose i=1i = 1i=1 and X=11X = 11X=11, such that 11‚ą£1111|1111‚ą£11. Thus, A1:=1111=1A_1 := \frac{11}{11} = 1A1‚Äč:=1111‚Äč=1.
Choose i=2i = 2i=2 and X=13X = 13X=13, such that 13‚ą£1313|1313‚ą£13. Thus, A2:=1313=1A_2 := \frac{13}{13} = 1A2‚Äč:=1313‚Äč=1.
Choose i=3i = 3i=3 and X=17X = 17X=17, such that 17‚ą£1717|1717‚ą£17. Thus, A3:=1717=1A_3 := \frac{17}{17} = 1A3‚Äč:=1717‚Äč=1.
Choose i=4i = 4i=4 and X=19X = 19X=19, such that 19‚ą£1919|1919‚ą£19. Thus, A4:=1919=1A_4 := \frac{19}{19} = 1A4‚Äč:=1919‚Äč=1.

Thus, using four operations, we made all the elements equal.
